title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 70.360 - Power given to distribute cost
text:
70.360.  Power given to distribute cost. — Any such city is hereby given power by its charter or amendment thereto to determine the manner, method and distribution of the cost of the work and rights-of-way to be paid for in special assessments and to establish thereby the procedure in such cases and the form of obligation to be issued.
(RSMo 1939 § 6479) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6356; 1919 § 7859
